name: OXO Good Grips 11 lb Stainless Steel Food Scale with Pull-Out Display
features: Pull-out display prevents large bowls and plates from blocking the readout
Measures in grams, ounces, and pounds with 1-gram precision
11 lb / 5 kg capacity handles large batch baking with ease
Tare function resets to zero for multi-ingredient sequential weighing
Auto shut-off after 5 minutes of inactivity preserves battery life
Stainless steel platform is easy to clean and resists staining
pros: Pull-out display is a genuine innovation — no other scale in this price range offers it
Stainless platform cleans up in seconds with a damp cloth
Reads clearly in low-light kitchens due to large LCD display
cons: Auto shut-off can trigger mid-recipe if you pause — requires a quick button press to restart
Batteries not included — requires 2 AAA batteries

name: Escali Primo P115C Precision Kitchen Food Scale
features: Measures in grams and ounces with 1-gram precision up to 11 lbs / 5 kg
Large, easy-to-read LCD display with backlight for low-light kitchens
Tare button allows zero-out function for sequential ingredient weighing
Compact, lightweight design (less than 1 lb) takes minimal counter space
NSF International certified for commercial food service use
15-year warranty — unusually strong guarantee in this category
pros: NSF certification means it's validated to professional standards of accuracy
15-year warranty is the longest in the category by a wide margin
Lightweight and compact — easily stored in a drawer when not in use
cons: Display is not backlit on all models — check version before purchasing
No pull-out display — large bowls can partially obscure the readout

name: KitchenAid KQ907OB Digital Kitchen Scale
features: Weighs in grams, ounces, pounds, and kilograms
11 lb / 5 kg capacity with 1-gram precision
Removable stainless steel weighing platform for easy cleaning
Tare function for multi-ingredient weighing without extra bowls
Clean design with backlit LCD fits any kitchen aesthetic
Auto shut-off conserves battery life after 4 minutes of inactivity
pros: Removable platform is a notable advantage — no crumbs stuck in crevices
KitchenAid brand recognition makes it a kitchen-matching aesthetic choice
Backlit display readable from arm's length while hands are in dough
cons: Limited to 11 lb capacity — insufficient for large-batch canning
Auto shut-off at 4 minutes is slightly faster than competitors

name: Etekcity Food Kitchen Scale, 0.1g Precision
features: 0.1 gram precision for nutritional tracking, coffee brewing, and baking
11 lb / 5 kg capacity handles most cooking and baking tasks
5 units: grams, ounces, pounds, milliliters, fluid ounces
Tare function for sequential weighing without additional bowls
Slim, flat design (only 0.6 inches thick) stores easily in any drawer
Stainless steel weighing surface with touch-sensitive buttons
pros: Best value scale for precision — 0.1g accuracy at under $15 is exceptional
Five measurement units covers coffee, baking, nutrition, and liquid measuring
Slim profile is the most drawer-friendly design in the category
cons: Budget build quality — plastic housing shows wear faster than premium options
Lower build confidence than OXO or Escali at sustained daily use

name: Salter Aquatronic Glass Platform Kitchen Scale
features: Aquatronic feature measures liquid ingredients by weight in milliliters
Tempered glass platform is hygienic, easy to clean, and visually elegant
Measures up to 11 lbs / 5 kg with 1-gram precision
Large display with easy-to-read digits from a distance
Salter's 15-year guarantee on UK-made scales
Add & weigh function for sequential ingredient addition
pros: Tempered glass platform is the most hygienic material available in kitchen scales
Aquatronic liquid measurement eliminates the need for a separate liquid measuring cup
British heritage brand with 250+ year history in precision weighing
cons: Glass platform requires more care than stainless steel — can chip if dropped
Slightly slower response time than digital competitors on rapid weight changes

name: American Weigh Scales LB-3000 Compact Digital Scale
features: 0.1 gram precision for coffee, spices, and nutritional tracking
6.6 lb / 3 kg capacity in a compact footprint
Stainless steel weighing platform is durable and easy to clean
Tare function and overload indication
Calibration feature maintains accuracy over time
Compact design fits in a small kitchen drawer or pocket
pros: Calibration capability maintains precision over years of use — unusual at this price
Compact size is ideal for coffee enthusiasts who need portability
Extremely accurate 0.1g reading for pour-over coffee and recipe precision
cons: 3 kg maximum capacity limits use for large-batch cooking
Small platform size can make weighing large items awkward

name: Greater Goods Nourish Digital Kitchen Scale
features: Nutritional data calculation on the built-in display for macro tracking
Measures up to 11 lb in grams, ounces, and pounds with 1-gram precision
Flat tempered glass surface is hygienic and easy to wipe clean
Tare function for multi-ingredient weighing
Charity model — portion of every sale goes to global nutrition programs
Large backlit LCD readable from above while standing
pros: Nutritional tracking built-in makes this the best scale for macro-counting diets
Social mission differentiator — buy a good product while supporting nutrition programs
Glass surface combined with nutritional features is unique in the sub-$30 range
cons: Nutritional database access requires connecting to an app for extended use
Battery compartment design can be fiddly to open

name: Tanita KD-400 Digital Kitchen Scale
features: Professional-grade accuracy from a company with 75+ years in precision measurement
11 lb / 5 kg capacity with 1-gram precision
Removable stainless steel weighing bowl included for easy ingredient transfer
Blue LCD backlit display readable in any lighting condition
Hold function freezes display when weighing ingredients in awkward positions
Durable commercial-grade build quality designed for daily professional use
pros: Professional measurement heritage gives Tanita credibility beyond consumer brands
Hold function is genuinely useful for weighing meat or ingredients in bowls
Removable bowl is more useful than a flat platform for loose or liquid ingredients
cons: Higher price than comparable consumer scales
Design is functional but dated compared to modern minimalist competitors

name: Nicewell Food Scale with Stainless Steel Platform, 22 lb Capacity
features: 22 lb / 10 kg capacity — doubles the range of standard kitchen scales
Stainless steel platform measures 8.7 x 6.7 inches for larger items
1-gram precision throughout the full 22 lb range
Tare function and auto shut-off after 3 minutes
4 units: grams, ounces, pounds, milliliters
Measures liquids in ml — equivalent to a measuring cup for water-density liquids
pros: 22 lb capacity is the best choice for canning, bulk cooking, and weighing full roasts
Large platform accommodates oversized bowls and baking sheets
Maintains 1-gram precision all the way to 22 lb — impressive accuracy at range
cons: Auto shut-off at 3 minutes is faster than most competitors
Slightly bulkier than 11-lb scales due to the larger platform size

name: Taylor Precision Products Glass Top Kitchen Scale
features: 11 lb / 5 kg capacity with easy touch controls
Tempered glass platform resists stains and is dishwasher-safe
Measures in grams, ounces, and pounds
Tare function for simple sequential measuring
Slim profile stores easily in any kitchen drawer
Trusted Taylor brand with 150+ year history in precision instruments
pros: Dishwasher-safe glass platform is genuinely convenient for food prep cleanup
Affordable price makes it the best entry-level glass-top scale
Taylor brand is widely trusted in professional kitchen contexts
cons: Basic feature set — lacks nutritional tracking or liquid measurement functions
Display can be hard to read at steep angles
